title: SubReaper charges tracker
description: One entry per recurring subscription/charge found during a sweep.

signin_method.description: How the account is accessed, e.g. 'google', 'apple', 'email_password'

url.description: Direct link to the billing/subscription management page

first_seen_charge_date.description: Earliest charge date found, ISO 8601, or null if unknown

last_seen_charge_date.description: Most recent charge date found, ISO 8601, or null if unknown

evidence_gmail_query.description: The Gmail search that surfaced this charge, if applicable

evidence_snippet.description: Short quote or summary of the evidence found

cancel_notes.description: History, caveats, and exact steps taken if/when cancellation was attempted

last_updated.description: ISO 8601 date this entry was last touched
